'''rarate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weetingly|weetingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weetingly|weetingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rarate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:rarate|rarate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:raratesher|raratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:raratesherĂ«m|raratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:raratero|raratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rarateshĂ«|rarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rarateshĂ«m|rarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiraratero|gokiraratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirarateshĂ«|gokirarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirarateshĂ«m|gokirarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorarankerom|gorarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorarankeshĂ«|gorarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorarankeshĂ«m|gorarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorarankeya|gorarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:raraterom|raraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:raratemu|raratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rarateya|rarateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiraraterom|gokiraraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiraratemu|gokiraratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirarateya|gokirarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:rararate|rararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rararatesher|rararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rararatesherĂ«m|rararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rararatero|rararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rararateshĂ«|rararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rararateshĂ«m|rararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirararatero|gokirararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirararateshĂ«|gokirararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirararateshĂ«m|gokirararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorararankerom|gorararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorararankeshĂ«|gorararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorararankeshĂ«m|gorararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorararankeya|gorararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rararaterom|rararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rararatemu|rararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rararateya|rararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirararaterom|gokirararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirararatemu|gokirararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirararateya|gokirararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠrĂŠte|rĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠrĂŠtesher|rĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠrĂŠtero|rĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠrĂŠtero|gokirĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠrĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠrĂŠterom|rĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠrĂŠtemu|rĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠrĂŠteya|rĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠrĂŠterom|gokirĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠrĂŠteya|gokirĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafrafte|rafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafraftesher|rafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafraftesherĂ«m|rafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafraftero|rafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafrafteshĂ«|rafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafrafteshĂ«m|rafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafraftero|gokirafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafrafteshĂ«|gokirafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafrafteshĂ«m|gokirafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafrafnkerom|gorafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafrafnkeshĂ«|gorafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafrafnkeshĂ«m|gorafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafrafnkeya|gorafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafrafterom|rafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafraftemu|rafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafrafteya|rafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafrafterom|gokirafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafraftemu|gokirafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafrafteya|gokirafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
